---
title: "Privacy Law Roundup — April 26, 2026"
date: 2026-04-26 15:14:36 +0530
categories: [news, roundup]
tags: [dpdpa, india, privacy, global, news]
---

## India: DPDPA Enactment & Compliance Readiness

India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDPA) 2023, along with its associated 2025 rules, has officially been brought into force, marking a pivotal moment for data privacy in the country. This enactment triggers a new era of compliance obligations for data fiduciaries, with various entities publishing guides to help navigate the practical implementation of the law. The rules detail how the Act's principles will be put into practice, aiming to establish a balanced framework for data processing.
([Source](https://www.hoganlovells.com/publications/india-s-digital-personal-data-protection-act-2023-brought-into-force)) ([Source](https://iapp.org/news/a/with-rules-finalized-indias-dpdpa-takes-force/)) ([Source](https://www.ey.com/en_in/legal/dpdp-act-2023-and-dpdp-rules-2025-compliance-guide)) ([Source](https://www.jdsupra.com/legalnews/dpdpa-rules-how-india-s-privacy-law-3635790/))

## India: Legal Challenges to DPDPA

The Supreme Court of India has issued notice on constitutional challenges filed against the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023, and its 2025 rules. Petitions, including one from the Reporters Collective and the RTI Forum, question the legality of certain provisions within the Act, raising concerns about its potential impact on fundamental rights and transparency. This legal scrutiny could influence the future interpretation and application of India's new privacy framework.
([Source](https://internetfreedom.in/supreme-court-issues-notice-on-constitutional-challenge-to-the-digital-personal-data-protection-act-2023-and-the-digital-personal-data-protection-rules-2025/)) ([Source](https://www.scobserver.in/cases/constitutionality-of-the-digital-personal-data-protection-act-2023/)) ([Source](https://www.livelaw.in/top-stories/reporters-collective-rti-forum-supreme-court-challenging-digital-personal-data-protection-act-2023-255097))

## India: Sectoral & Operational Impacts of DPDPA

Indian enterprises across various sectors, including adtech, banking, and AI, are actively assessing the operational impacts and compliance burdens introduced by the DPDPA. Partnerships are forming to support businesses in achieving compliance, while discussions continue on whether the Act promotes a "data maximisation" approach and the readiness of startups to meet new privacy obligations. Experts are also highlighting the critical role of the upcoming Data Protection Board and identifying potential regulatory blind spots within the framework.
([Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)) ([Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilgFBVV95cUxNZlN1dlg2Yjlpc2dKRHNBM3hWTExsb1Y2RGt5aGt3bmZvMnhHVUVyaTMyZ0hsRk9uMmlqbUF0eUZpUENtUEJIR1MwTjdTTm9rTkFEV2hmTVFSWk5Ya3FMVERxT3hmV04wSjZtQlBic3ZlNGdqY3BoV1R2cWg1NDYydXE3SGYyMnNNM2tnU2lWNGN5Z0ZTRUE?oc=5)) ([Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)) ([Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)) ([Source](https://iapp.org/news/a/top-10-operational-impacts-of-indias-dpdpa/)) ([Source](https://iapp.org/news/a/top-10-operational-impacts-of-indias-dpdpa-enforcement-and-the-data-protection-board/)) ([Source](https://iapp.org/news/a/top-10-operational-impacts-of-indias-dpdpa-scope-key-definitions-and-lawful-data-processing/)) ([Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)) ([Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimgFBVV95cUxORE1iX29JWVo5eW1PT29VNDZMb3RpR19sRjdMMnB4a3NjclB0eXZmQ052WmRqSUlYd3RfTC1SYVdTS2ZRc09kTkNzejkwWFM4aUxwS3YzZG41MGx4N2lfZjVIWmJuakJ5U2o4VDZjQUhhTExfS3R0UUdLdGMtb0hUVlp0SkZmZ21ERFhUVTVoLXk3QkNTbGk1ZV9B?oc=5)) ([Source](https://iapp.org/news/a/the-act-unpacked-fundamentals-of-compliance-under-indias-digital-personal-data-protection-act/)) ([Source](https://iapp.org/news/a/notes-from-the-asia-pacific-region-india-looks-to-dpdpa-compliance/)) ([Source](https://www.livelaw.in/columns/the-regulatory-blind-spot-in-indias-digital-personal-data-protection-framework-255099))

Why it matters: The DPDPA's full implementation ushers in a new era of data governance for India, demanding immediate attention from businesses and data fiduciaries, even as its constitutional validity faces early legal challenges.
